$comment: Single source of truth for every book-specific string + the portability seam. The engine (kit/) reads only from here. kit.dir is the submodule path relative to this file's directory.
author: Felipe Fontoura

pt.title: Spec-Driven Development
pt.subtitle: O Guia Definitivo para Construir Software com Agentes de IA
pt.eyebrow: Do método ao código em produção
pt.description: O guia definitivo de Spec-Driven Development: o método que levou 13 apps a produção em 70 dias, solo, com agentes de IA. Requirements, design e tasks em formato EARS, gates de aprovação, o antídoto ao vibe coding — com Claude Code, e comparado a GitHub Spec Kit e AWS Kiro. Construindo o TaskFlow Pro do zero.

cover.title: Spec-Driven Development
cover.subtitle: O Guia Definitivo para Construir Software com Agentes de IA
cover.label: DO MÉTODO AO CÓDIGO EM PRODUÇÃO

en.title: Spec-Driven Development
en.subtitle: The Definitive Guide to Building Software with AI Agents
en.eyebrow: From the method to production code
en.description: The definitive guide to Spec-Driven Development: the method that shipped 13 apps to production in 70 days, solo, with AI agents. Requirements, design, and tasks in EARS format, approval gates, the antidote to vibe coding — with Claude Code, and compared to GitHub Spec Kit and AWS Kiro. Building TaskFlow Pro from scratch.

cover.title: Spec-Driven Development
cover.subtitle: The Definitive Guide to Building Software with AI Agents
cover.label: FROM THE METHOD TO PRODUCTION CODE
